name: REGENXBIO Inc.
business: We are a leading clinical-stage biotechnology company seeking to improve lives through the curative potential of gene therapy. Our investigational gene therapies are designed to deliver functional genes to address genetic defects in cells, enabling the production of therapeutic proteins or antibodies that are intended to impact disease.
namedCustomers: Novartis Gene Therapies, Inc. (Novartis Gene Therapies)

exposures.sentence: We are a leading clinical-stage biotechnology company seeking to improve lives through the curative potential of gene therapy.

catalysts.event: Topline data from ATMOSPHERE and ASCENT pivotal trials for wet AMD using subretinal delivery
catalysts.sentence: Topline data from these trials are expected to be shared in the fourth quarter of 2026 in partnership with AbbVie.

catalysts.event: First patient dosed in NAAVIGATE Phase IIb/III trial for diabetic retinopathy
catalysts.sentence: We expect to dose the first patient in NAAVIGATE in the second quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Topline data from AFFINITY DUCHENNE pivotal trial for RGX-202
catalysts.sentence: We expect to share topline data in the early second quarter of 2026 and request a pre-Biologics License Application (BLA) meeting with the FDA in mid-2026.

tamClaims.claim: An estimated 34 million people globally have DME.
tamClaims.sentence: DME is a vision-threatening complication of DR; an estimated 34 million people globally have DME.
